title: Frontend Batch 28 - Admin Video Secondary Failure Sanitization Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced Work editor secondary video failure states for saved video removal, saved video reordering, and fallback thumbnail regeneration without losing rendered state.
behaviorBugsFound: Saved video delete failures could show raw SQL/status/stack details.
Saved video reorder failures could show raw backend/status/stack details.
Thumbnail regeneration upload failures could show raw Cloudflare/R2/storage/stack details.

validation.command: npx skills find react video failure sanitization testing

remainingGaps: Video insert-into-body failure handling remains covered mainly through existing editor integration tests.
Inline public Work editor video secondary failure routing was not broadened.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 29 - Admin Inline Editor Routing and Return Path Reinforcement.
